A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

Use this method to retrieve the access instance from a keychain item. # SecKeychainItemCopyAccess(_:_:)

**Function**

Retrieves the access of a given keychain item.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecKeychainItemCopyAccess(_ itemRef: SecKeychainItem, _ access: UnsafeMutablePointer<SecAccess?>) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **itemRef**: A keychain item.
- **access**: On return, points to the keychain item’s access instance. Call the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] method to release this access instance when you are finished using it.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

Use this method to retrieve the access instance from a keychain item. Alternatively, you can look for the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccess] attribute among the keychain item’s attributes when you call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] method.
